issues_list.title: Build real-time metrics ingestion pipeline
issues_list.description: HTTP ingestion endpoint with Redis buffering and TimescaleDB storage with continuous aggregates

test_strategy.automated_tests: Integration test: ingest metrics, verify stored in TimescaleDB. Load test: 1K requests/sec
test_strategy.manual_verification: Send metrics via curl, query TimescaleDB to verify storage and aggregation

issues_list.title: Create dashboard overview with metric cards and charts
issues_list.description: Overview page with summary cards, model health cards with sparklines, and time range selector

test_strategy.automated_tests: Component test: metric cards render, time range updates charts, auto-refresh triggers
test_strategy.manual_verification: Open dashboard, verify live data displays, change time range, check auto-refresh

issues_list.title: Implement alert configuration and threshold management
issues_list.description: CRUD for alert rules with metric/threshold/channel selection and live chart preview of threshold line

test_strategy.automated_tests: Integration test: create, read, update, delete alert rules. Component test: threshold preview renders
test_strategy.manual_verification: Create alert rule, verify threshold line appears on chart, edit and delete rule

issues_list.title: Add cost analysis and budget tracking views
issues_list.description: Cost tab with spend breakdown by model, daily/monthly charts, budget alerts, and cost-per-request comparison

test_strategy.automated_tests: Integration test: cost aggregation queries return correct totals. Component test: charts render
test_strategy.manual_verification: View cost breakdown, verify totals match, set budget alert, check projected spend

issues_list.title: Set up Slack and email alert delivery
issues_list.description: Alert evaluation worker with hybrid streaming/polling, Slack webhook delivery, and SendGrid email

test_strategy.automated_tests: Unit test: alert evaluation logic. Integration test: mock Slack/SendGrid delivery
test_strategy.manual_verification: Trigger alert threshold breach, verify Slack message and email received within 60s

definition_of_done: Each feature independently testable by a human, all acceptance criteria met
